textByHash.42ef344e0ae3c05f1678095c36d24f08f8baf38f: Tetamo! If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
textByHash.7b453e3e291272d92e54a0f68bf268f73ee6d73e: I have a selection of both rare and common furs from all across the kingdom. Also, if you happen to have any furs you've brought from the east, I'd be pretty keen to buy some.
textByHash.a95a2e813526028c546d301e6a62e15051513c8d: Hello there. Want to trade some furs?
textByHash.ea3095e0fd1b2d94a8c6aec869785fdfef7b3845: You're the one who stole from me! Guards! Guards!
